# CVPixelBufferPoolGetTypeID()

**Function**

Returns the Core Foundation type identifier of the pixel buffer pool type.

## Declaration

```swift
func CVPixelBufferPoolGetTypeID() -> CFTypeID
```

## Return Value

The Core Foundation type identifier for this pixel buffer.

## Inspecting pools

- **CVPixelBufferPoolGetAttributes(_:)**: The pool attributes dictionary for a pixel buffer pool.
- **CVPixelBufferPoolGetPixelBufferAttributes(_:)**: The attributes of pixel buffers which the system creates using the pool you specify.
